SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable

Class Metrics

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.Metrics
public class Metrics extends Object
Mutable key-value bag for failover metrics, keyed with a "failover-" prefix. Use of(String) to create an instance and collect(String, String) to add entries.
Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Metrics
    collect(String key, boolean value)
    boolean overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Boolean.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
    Metrics
    collect(String key, long value)
    long overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Long.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
    Metrics
    collect(String key, String value)
    Adds a key-value pair to this metrics bag, prefixing the key with "failover-".
    Map<String,String>
    getInfo()
    Returns an unmodifiable view of all collected metric entries.
    static Metrics
    of(String name)
    Creates a new Metrics instance pre-populated with a name entry.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static Metrics of(String name)
      Creates a new Metrics instance pre-populated with a name entry.
      Parameters:
      name - the metric name
      Returns:
      new metrics instance

    • collect

      public Metrics collect(String key, String value)
      Adds a key-value pair to this metrics bag, prefixing the key with "failover-".

      A null value is stored as the empty string — consumers such as MDC adapters or Micrometer tag builders must never receive a null metric value.

      Parameters:
      key - the metric key (will be stored as "failover-" + key)
      value - the metric value; null is coerced to ""
      Returns:
      this instance for chaining

    • collect

      public Metrics collect(String key, long value)
      long overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Long.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
      Parameters:
      key - the metric key
      value - the numeric metric value
      Returns:
      this instance for chaining

    • collect

      public Metrics collect(String key, boolean value)
      boolean overload of collect(String, String) — removes the repeated Boolean.toString(...) noise at call sites (audit A-3/Q-2).
      Parameters:
      key - the metric key
      value - the boolean metric value
      Returns:
      this instance for chaining

    • getInfo

      public Map<String,String> getInfo()
      Returns an unmodifiable view of all collected metric entries.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map of prefixed key-value pairs
